name: Ingebrigtsen weekly (time-based)
goal: repeating weekly template - length set by the program dates in config.json
template: The Ingebrigtsen double-threshold week converted from distance to time (the minutes the source athletes spend, not their km): 10km easy -> 45min, 20km long -> 90min, 10x1000m -> 10x3min, 5x2km -> 5x6min, 25x400m -> 25x66s, 20x219m hill -> 20x35s. Strength/core/gym sessions from the source are omitted. Every week is identical - edit days in the GUI to scale it down; edits live in plans/overrides.json.
notes: Lactate targets mapped to percent-of-10k-pace: 2.5 mmol -> 91-93% (sub-threshold), 3.5 mmol -> 95-97% (threshold), hills ~8 mmol -> hard by feel
As written this is the full elite week (~10 sessions, ~7.5 h, ~88 km at current paces) - drop PM sessions first when trimming
Threshold discipline is the whole point: 91-97% should feel controlled, never a race

Specific phase (amber, final 5 weeks + race week): applied AUTOMATICALLY via specific_phase below - the AM sub-threshold machinery never changes; one session per week turns toward race pace (Almgren/Jakob verified progression, knowledge/base-to-specific-transition.md). Race-specific sessions are DISTANCE-based at the real rep distances (25x400m, 3x3km, 10x1km) - in the specific phase specificity beats physiological control; only base work is time-converted. 5 & 4 weeks out: the Thu PM session becomes Jakob's 25x400m drifting to race pace. 3 weeks out: Tue PM = Almgren's 3x3km progressive. 1 week out: Tue PM is the final big session 10-12 days before a weekend race (Almgren's 10x1km), then everything controlled
Race week (green): volume roughly halved, 2-3 short touches of race pace early in the week, very easy + strides the last 2 days

specific_phase keys are weeks before race week (1 = the week just before, 0 = race week); the variant is picked from the next race's distance (<=6km: 5k, <=15km: 10k, else half); listed days replace the template day, everything else stays the identical base week, and the amber 'specific' label covers exactly the weeks the variant rewrites. Overlay days carry "specific": am/pm/day - the GUI highlights that session amber in the calendar so the race-specific work stands out

Half marathon conversion (Almgren-verified, 2025 Valencia 58:41): Tue/Thu double threshold and the week stay UNCHANGED - only Saturday hills swap for the long progressive HM session (3x5km @ 91-95%, controlled -> strong -> near-HM effort; only the final rep approaches race intensity) for 3 weeks, shorter exposure 8 days out, race-week taper with HM-pace touches
km figures per day are rough estimates at current paces, used only for the done-mark
